name: canonical_pa_request
description: Canonical structure for an outpatient prior-authorization request. parse_pa_request normalizes the raw request files into this shape; all downstream tools consume it.
_TODO_step_4: Define the full canonical shape below. The `healthcare-solution` branch is the answer key.
Top-level required: request_id, patient, procedure, diagnoses, ordering_provider, clinical.
patient: patient_id, age, sex, member_id, plan_type.
diagnoses[]: icd10_code, description, primary (exactly one primary).
clinical: indication, conservative_tx_weeks, physical_therapy_completed, prior_imaging, mechanical_symptoms, neuro_deficit, notes.
Keep this file valid JSON — the /api/schemas endpoint serves it as-is.

clinical.description: Clinical facts the payer policy is evaluated against.

properties._TODO: Add conservative_tx_weeks (int), physical_therapy_completed (bool), prior_imaging (bool), mechanical_symptoms (bool), neuro_deficit (bool), notes (string).
